name: diagnostic-lens
description: Enhances VS Code diagnostics with inline pill-shaped indicators showing errors, warnings, hints, and info.

diagnosticLens.enableInfo.description: Show inline indicators for informational messages.

diagnosticLens.pillTransparency.description: Background blending intensity for the pill (0 = editor background, 1 = full diagnostic color).

diagnosticLens.pillOpacity.description: Visual opacity of the pill element (0 = invisible, 1 = fully visible).

diagnosticLens.maxMessageLength.description: Maximum number of characters to display in the inline message.

diagnosticLens.dotSize.description: Scale factor for diagnostic dots — applies to both glyph margin dots and inline pill dots (1.0 = default size).

diagnosticLens.dotOpacity.description: Opacity for all diagnostic dots (glyph margin and inline pill dots).

diagnosticLens.arrowColor.description: Custom color for the arrow indicator, as a hex value (e.g. #888888). Leave empty to use the editor's muted foreground color.

diagnosticLens.arrowOpacity.description: Opacity of the arrow indicator (0 = invisible, 1 = fully opaque).
